description: Fix 5 broken CTAs, config save failure, weak passwords, misleading credit displays, unpolished dropdowns, missing item limits, and auto-trigger meeting analysis pipeline on ingestion.

userStories.title: Fix ActivationChecklist 'Complete Your Profile' CTA
userStories.description: As a new user, I want the 'Go to Profile' button to take me to a working profile page so I can complete my setup.
acceptanceCriteria: href changed from /settings/profile to /settings/account in ActivationChecklist.tsx
Clicking 'Go to Profile' lands on a working page
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: File: src/components/dashboard/ActivationChecklist.tsx line 43

acceptanceCriteria: href changed from /settings/integrations to /integrations for first_meeting_synced item
Clicking 'Connect Calendar' lands on the integrations hub page
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Fix ActivationChecklist 'Invite Team' CTA
userStories.description: As a new user, I want the 'Invite Team' button to take me to the team management page.
acceptanceCriteria: href changed from /settings/team to /settings/team-members for team_invited item
Clicking 'Invite Team' lands on organization management page
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Seed missing config keys in agent_config_defaults
userStories.description: As a new user, I want saving my configuration during onboarding to succeed instead of showing 'Failed to save configuration.'
acceptanceCriteria: New migration seeds 14 onboarding config keys into agent_config_defaults table
Keys: fiscal_year_start_month, typical_deal_size_range, average_sales_cycle_days, crm_stage_mapping (agent_type: deal_risk)
Keys: sales_methodology, sales_motion_type, key_competitors, pricing_model, target_customer_profile, common_objections (agent_type: crm_update)
Keys: industry_vertical, company_size, product_service_category, team_size (agent_type: morning_briefing)
Migration uses ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING for idempotency
setOrgOverride calls succeed for all config keys after migration
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Root cause: agent-config-admin edge function validates config_key exists in agent_config_defaults before allowing set_org_override. None of the onboarding keys were ever seeded. File: supabase/functions/agent-config-admin/index.ts lines 96-105.

userStories.title: Strengthen password validation on signup
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I want signup passwords to require at least 1 uppercase letter and 1 special character for better security.
acceptanceCriteria: Password requires: min 6 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 special character
Validation in src/pages/auth/signup.tsx handleSubmit
Hint text updated to: 'Min 6 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 special character'
Specific toast error message for each missing requirement
Same validation applied in TestUserSignup.tsx and InviteSignup.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: Current validation only checks length >= 6 at signup.tsx line 124

userStories.title: Fix credits depleted banner race condition for new users
userStories.description: As a new user, I want to see a welcome banner about my free credits instead of 'AI credits depleted'.
acceptanceCriteria: When balance <= 0 AND user has zero ai_cost_events, do NOT show red depleted banner
Show green banner or suppress entirely while welcome credits are pending
If welcome credits localStorage flag is 'pending', show green banner even before balance refreshes
After credits granted and balance > 0, green banner shows '10 Free AI credits have been added!'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: File: src/components/credits/LowBalanceBanner.tsx. Welcome banner logic exists at line 48 but depends on timing. grant-welcome-credits runs from CompletionStep.tsx line 116-125.

userStories.title: Remove credit migration popup for new users
userStories.description: As a new user, I want to not see a 'We've upgraded your credits' popup since I never had a prior version.
acceptanceCriteria: CreditMigrationModal does NOT show for orgs created after credit system launch
Add guard: check org.created_at against cutoff date or check for migration ledger entries
Existing users who haven't dismissed it should still see it
localStorage DISMISSED_KEY check remains as secondary guard
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: File: src/components/credits/CreditMigrationModal.tsx. Currently only guards via localStorage key (line 24) — no server-side new-user detection.

userStories.title: Fix UsageChart header stats — remove dollar signs
userStories.description: As a user, I want the usage chart header pills to show credits not dollars.
acceptanceCriteria: Line 356: Change from $X.XX to 'X.X credits'
Line 363: Change 30d estimate from $X.XX to credits format
Lines 384: Change projection cards from '$X.XX/mo' to 'X.X credits/mo'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: File: src/components/credits/UsageChart.tsx. estimated_cost stores credit units not USD.

userStories.title: Fix UsageChart tooltip and Y-axis — remove dollar signs
userStories.description: As a user, I want chart tooltips and axis labels to show credits not dollars.
acceptanceCriteria: Line 201 (CustomTooltip): Change from $X.XXXX to credits format
Line 414 (Y-axis tickFormatter): Change from $X to credits format
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: src/components/credits/UsageChart.tsx

userStories.title: Fix UsageChart legend and section header labels
userStories.description: As a user, I want the chart legend and page header to use credit-appropriate language.
acceptanceCriteria: renderLegend: 'Actual spend' changed to 'Credits used'
CreditsSettingsPage.tsx line 411: 'Spend Trend (30 Days)' changed to 'Usage Trend (30 Days)'
Header stat label 'Actual' updated if needed for clarity
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: src/components/credits/UsageChart.tsx lines 212-240, src/pages/settings/CreditsSettingsPage.tsx line 411

userStories.title: Tag onboarding cost events with source metadata
userStories.description: As a new user, I want onboarding AI costs to be tagged so they can be excluded from my usage display.
acceptanceCriteria: deep-enrich-organization logAICostEvent (line 522) adds metadata: { source: 'onboarding' }
agent-initial-scan logAICostEvent adds metadata: { source: 'onboarding' }
api-skill-builder logAICostEvent calls add metadata: { source: 'onboarding' } when called during onboarding
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: deep-enrich-organization logs with hardcoded 1000/800 token counts. metadata jsonb column already exists on ai_cost_events.

userStories.title: Filter onboarding cost events from UsageChart display
userStories.description: As a new user, I want the usage chart to exclude onboarding setup costs so I see 0 usage on first login.
acceptanceCriteria: UsageChart query (line 73-79) filters out events where metadata->>'source' = 'onboarding'
New users see 0 usage on first login (not $3 / 3 credits)
Admin/power users can optionally see all events if needed
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: Depends on US-013 (tagging) being deployed first. File: src/components/credits/UsageChart.tsx

userStories.title: Fix fiscal year dropdown to show month names
userStories.description: As a new user, I want the fiscal year dropdown to show month names instead of numbers.
acceptanceCriteria: Dropdown shows Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul, Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec
Stored value remains numeric (1-12) — only display label changes
Fix applied in AgentConfigConfirmStep.tsx lines 83-85
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

acceptanceCriteria: Options display as: Generic, MEDDIC, BANT, SPIN, Challenger
Acronyms fully capitalised: MEDDIC, BANT, SPIN
Non-acronyms start with capital: Generic, Challenger
Stored value can remain lowercase — only display label changes
Fix applied in AgentConfigConfirmStep.tsx line 64

acceptanceCriteria: Generic tooltip: 'A flexible, general-purpose sales approach'
MEDDIC tooltip: 'Metrics, Economic Buyer, Decision Criteria, Decision Process, Identify Pain, Champion'

Challenger tooltip: 'The Challenger Sale — teach, tailor, and take control of the conversation'
Uses existing Radix/shadcn Tooltip component

userStories.title: Add item limit to AgentConfigConfirmStep TagEditor
userStories.description: As a new user, I want tag inputs limited to 10 items so the system isn't overloaded.
acceptanceCriteria: TagEditor component (lines 217-270) enforces MAX_ITEMS = 10
add() function (line 226) checks values.length >= MAX_ITEMS before adding
Input disabled or hidden when limit reached
Warning text shown: 'Maximum 10 items'
Affects: key_competitors and common_objections fields
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: File: src/pages/onboarding/v2/AgentConfigConfirmStep.tsx. TagEditor has zero length enforcement currently.

userStories.title: Add item limits to AIIntelligencePage settings
userStories.description: As a user editing AI settings, I want all list inputs limited to 10 items for consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: Define MAX_ITEMS = 10 constant in AIIntelligencePage.tsx
Add buttons for criteria (611), disqualifiers (652), questions (697), objections (802) disabled at limit
onKeyDown Enter handlers for avoid words (743) and buyingSignals (859) check count before adding
Warning text shown when limit reached for each field
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: File: src/pages/settings/AIIntelligencePage.tsx. 6 separate add-item locations all unlimited.

userStories.title: Auto-trigger basic analysis on Fathom webhook ingestion
userStories.description: As a user, I want meetings synced via Fathom to be automatically analyzed by AI so I don't have to manually click Reprocess.
acceptanceCriteria: When meetings-webhook receives a transcript event, auto-trigger analyzeTranscriptWithClaude
Analysis runs asynchronously so webhook responds quickly
Credits checked via checkCreditBalance — skip silently if insufficient
Cost event logged with feature key meeting_summary
Idempotency: skip if meeting already has sentiment_score
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: supabase/functions/meetings-webhook/index.ts. Currently only stores data, no AI analysis triggered.

userStories.title: Auto-trigger basic analysis on MeetingBaaS ingestion
userStories.description: As a user using the 60 Notetaker, I want meetings automatically analyzed when transcription completes.
acceptanceCriteria: When meetingbaas-webhook receives transcript.ready, after process-recording, auto-trigger analyzeTranscriptWithClaude
Same credit check and idempotency guards as US-020
Cost event logged
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: supabase/functions/meetingbaas-webhook/index.ts

userStories.title: Auto-trigger deep structured summary after basic analysis
userStories.description: As a user, I want the deep structured summary to run automatically so dashboard stats are populated without manual action.
acceptanceCriteria: After analyzeTranscriptWithClaude completes, auto-invoke meeting-process-structured-summary
Credit check before running — skip silently if insufficient (basic summary remains as fallback)
Populates: meeting_structured_summaries, meeting_classifications, deal_truth_fields
Dashboard stats update automatically
Cost event logged
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: meeting-process-structured-summary uses Claude Sonnet 4 (~3 credits). Populates meeting_classifications boolean flags that power aggregate dashboard queries.

userStories.title: Auto-trigger scorecard generation after structured summary
userStories.description: As a user, I want coaching scorecards generated automatically so team KPI grid and coaching views are populated.
acceptanceCriteria: After meeting-process-structured-summary completes, auto-invoke meeting-generate-scorecard
Credit check before running — skip silently if insufficient
Populates: meeting_scorecards (overall_score, grade, metric_scores, coaching_tips)
Team KPI grid and coaching leaderboards update automatically
Cost event logged
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: meeting-generate-scorecard uses Claude Sonnet 4 (~3 credits). Feeds meeting_scorecards.overall_score into team KPI views.

userStories.title: Auto-queue meeting for Gemini intelligence indexing
userStories.description: As a user, I want new meetings automatically indexed for semantic search so Ask Anything works without manual intervention.
acceptanceCriteria: After analysis pipeline completes, insert row into meeting_index_queue
meeting-intelligence-process-queue picks it up on next cron run
Meeting becomes searchable via Ask Anything RAG panel
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Gemini File Search Store per org. meeting_index_queue table already exists. meeting-intelligence-process-queue already handles queue processing.

userStories.title: Create analysis pipeline orchestrator shared function
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single orchestrator function that chains all analysis steps so all ingestion paths use one consistent pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: Create runFullMeetingAnalysisPipeline(supabase, meetingId, orgId, userId) shared function
Pipeline: (1) analyzeTranscriptWithClaude → (2) meeting-process-structured-summary → (3) meeting-generate-scorecard → (4) queue Gemini indexing
Each step has independent credit check — pipeline continues if one step lacks credits
Each step has error handling — failure in one step does not block subsequent steps
Pipeline logs total credits consumed
All ingestion paths call this single orchestrator
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Shared function in supabase/functions/_shared/. Called by meetings-webhook, meetingbaas-webhook, fathom-sync, voice-transcribe-poll, and reprocess-meetings-ai.

userStories.title: Keep manual Reprocess button as fallback — upgrade to full pipeline
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manually reprocess a meeting to trigger the full analysis pipeline if auto-analysis was skipped.
acceptanceCriteria: Existing Reprocess button in MeetingDetail.tsx remains functional
Button now triggers the full pipeline (basic + structured summary + scorecard + indexing) not just basic
If meeting already has complete analysis, hide the reprocess banner
Credit-gated check remains via useCreditGatedAction
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: File: src/pages/MeetingDetail.tsx lines 921-963. Currently only calls reprocess-meetings-ai (basic). Should call runFullMeetingAnalysisPipeline.

userStories.title: Show analysis status indicators on meeting detail page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see what analysis has been completed on a meeting so I know if deeper insights are available.
acceptanceCriteria: MeetingDetail shows analysis status: Basic Analysis (check/pending), Structured Summary (check/pending), Scorecard (check/pending)
If all three complete, show 'Full analysis complete' badge
If only basic complete, show 'Deep analysis pending' with option to trigger
Status reads from meeting_structured_summaries and meeting_scorecards table presence
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: File: src/pages/MeetingDetail.tsx. Query meeting_structured_summaries and meeting_scorecards for the meeting_id to determine status.
